events.narrative: You are performing a routine check when a loud siren starts blaring.

sensory_input.sight: red flashing lights on the overhead panel
sensory_input.smell: faint scent of ozone and burning plastic

events.goal: Identify the source of the alarm.

events.narrative: The main door locks automatically. Smoke begins to fill the room.
events.goal: Find an alternative exit or stabilize the reactor.
